name: Mixed Fruit Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch square baking dish.
3. To make filling, core pears and apples and cut into 1/2-inch chunks; place in a large bowl.
4. Add the remaining ingredients for the filling (sugar, cinnamon, cloves, salt, apples, cherries, tapioca, nutmeg) and stir well.
5. Spoon the filling into the baking dish.
6. To make topping, in a large bowl, mix Bisquick, sugar, nuts, and milk until smooth.
7. Drop by heaping tablespoons over the filling.
8. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. To make brandied cream, in a small bowl, beat heavy cream, powdered sugar, and brandy until soft peaks form.
11. Serve with the cobbler.
